reviews.school_name: Bharatiya Vidya Bhavan's Public School - Jubilee Hills

school_address.streetAddress: Road No.71, Film Nagar, Jubilee Hills, near Apollo Hospital, Hyderabad, Telangana 500033

reviews.author: Prithvi Chandra
reviews.review_body:
Admission process! Your 4-5 attempts will go unnoticed!

The lottery system for admissions is an open lie.

Only kids from communities OC, Minorities and Christian are seen picking up the admission.

For SC/ST management cannot sell, so they are filled accordingly.

For BC - a big joke! A blatant real lie.

Many things go unnoticed while in admission process.

As per the school I am waiting for the time to see other schools excel leaving Bhavan's schools behind in Hyderabad.

Every parent wants their kids to be in schools of great legacy but due to the processes this school follows many kids who are sharp & talented couldn't fetch admission here.

reviews.school_name: Bharatiya Vidya Bhavan's Public School - Jubilee Hills
reviews.author: Ananya reddy
reviews.review_body:
I’m a student here from 12yrs
My elder brother also studied here. It’s a very prestigious school. I rly like the campus sometimes whenever I need to get some fresh air the nature around me helps a lot.The teachers r very helpful. They r rly patient with children. The faculty is great only thing is that about the canteen but it’s ok other than that it’s a great school. Unlike other schools our school doesn’t only view academics as a source of validation it brings out our inner sports men ship or anything. They give us many opportunities in everything and let all the kids participate making sure no one is left out
